👋 Welcome to the Auto Crypto Trading Journal community!

This is the official channel for the open-source, self-hosted crypto futures trading journal — built with Flask, SQLite, and Claude AI, running on a Raspberry Pi.

📈 What this project does:
• Syncs live trades from Bitget and Blofin automatically
• AI-powered call analyzer — paste any analyst call and get a full briefing with entry/SL/TP, position sizing, and a 1–10 quality score
• Setup Scanner — scans 100 USDT-M futures symbols every 30 min using a 3-stage pipeline (confluence → quality gate → AI scoring) with Telegram alerts
• Hindsight Analysis — retroactively scores your past trades to show how following AI recommendations would have changed your P&L
• Deep analytics — win rate, profit factor, Sharpe/Calmar ratios, drawdown overlay, market regime tags, and much more
• 100% self-hosted — your trading data never leaves your network

🆓 Free & open source
Everything runs on your own hardware. No subscriptions, no cloud lock-in, no data sharing.

🔗 GitHub: https://github.com/anvilfilbert/Auto-Crypto-Tradingjournal

📋 This community:
• 📢 Channel — release announcements and project news
• 💬 Discussion Group — join for updates, feedback, and bug reports
  → Updates: new releases posted automatically
  → Feedback & Feature Requests: share your ideas
  → Bug Reports: report issues
  → General: anything else

Feel free to star ⭐ the repo if you find it useful, and share your feedback in the group!
